nasb.text: Because I feared the great multitude, And the contempt of families terrified me, And kept silent and did not go out of doors?

esv.text: because I stood in great fear of the multitude, and the contempt of families terrified me, so that I kept silence, and did not go out of doors—

cnv.text: 因為我懼怕群眾， 宗族的藐視又使我驚恐， 以致我靜默不言，足不出門。

ccb.text: 因惧怕群众， 被族人藐视， 就默不作声、不敢出门？
